title: Lead Investment Banker at L&T Finance

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at L&T Finance
jsonLd.description:
L&T Finance is actively seeking a talented and motivated Investment Banker to join our dynamic team in Patna. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About L&T Finance:
L&T Finance is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in IFRS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with L&T Finance!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
